## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:native`
- [ ] `npm run test:sandbox` when UI behavior changed

## Risk

- [ ] Persistence or migration behavior changed
- [ ] SSH, RDP, clipboard, or file-transfer behavior changed
- [ ] Security or credential handling changed
- [ ] The change was checked in dark and light themes

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials, private infrastructure, diagnostics, generated installers, or personal screenshots are included
